useCases.label: Fulfillment Risk
useCases.prompt: Highlight overdue, unfulfilled, or exception orders so operators can act before delays impact customer experience.

useCases.label: Inventory Risk
useCases.prompt: Detect low-stock and high-velocity SKUs that are likely to stock out in the next 7-14 days.

useCases.label: Product Issues
useCases.prompt: Surface products with abnormal sales drops, high return rates, or unusual discount pressure.
